pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to leverage Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace the removed javax.inject module from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using @Inject will fail to compile without an explicit dependency on the API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation module from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using annotations like @PostConstruct or @Resource will fail to compile without an explicit dependency on the API.
